package rulecoverage

func NegativePaginationBindingDuplicatedOutsideBoundaryHelper() string {
    ruleID := "pagination_binding_duplicated_outside_boundary_helper"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repeated pagination DTO binding and defaulting logic across handler files."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
